prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the EA888 Evo4 (DNPA/DNPD) with 400+ HP via IS38 turbo upgrade to a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.06 A/R housing) paired with a custom 3.5" downpipe (Catted, 200-cell) from Integrated Engineering (IE) and a high-flow front-mount intercooler (FMIC) from Wagner Tuning (Competition, 1000HP-rated core).

034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts and transmission mounts (solid, no polyurethane) to eliminate EA888 Evo4 drivetrain slop, combined with an IE short shifter (aluminum, 35% reduction in throw) and a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (DMF delete) with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily (ceramic-metallic, 600+ ft-lb torque capacity).

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (VW-specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound, 40mm front/32mm rear pistons) with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end links) and SuperPro 8036K bushings (polyurethane, full subframe/diff/control arm kit) for chassis rigidity. Braking upgraded to Alcon 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, directional vanes) and 4-piston rears (356mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber, Golf R-specific, 30mm front/50mm rear fender flares) with custom matte vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Satin Quartz Gray) and a Vortex Generator carbon fiber roof (OEM+ fitment, 3.5kg weight reduction).

APR Carbon Fiber front splitter (Golf R-specific, 3-piece, adjustable dive planes) and a Maxton Design GT rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 4x100mm exhaust cutouts) paired with a Remus Valvetronic cat-back exhaust (dual 90mm tips, titanium silencers, Golf R-specific sound tuning).

OEM+ lighting upgrades: Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs (6500K, +150% brightness) with LUX H8/H11 LED fog lights and a custom Golf R Mk8-specific LED taillight conversion (VLEDS, sequential turn signals, smoked lenses). Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats (Golf R-specific side bolsters, Alcantara/leather, 15kg weight reduction) with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, Golf R-specific airbag) and a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport, 6-point, bolt-in, T45 steel).
